mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id, s.password, s.name, s.gender, s.major_id, s.class_id, s.grade, c.class_name, m.major_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.major_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT s.student_id, s.password, s.name, s.gender, s.major_id, s.class_id, s.grade, c.class_name, m.major_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.major_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student ( student_id, password, name, gender, major_id, class_id, grade ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{majorId}, #{classId}, #{grade} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, major_id = #{majorId}, class_id = #{classId}, grade = #{grade} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
